tasks.subject: Task 0: Project Scaffolding
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create folder9 Go project with chi server, config, health endpoint, Docker, Makefile.

**Files:** go.mod, cmd/server/main.go, internal/config/config.go, Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, Makefile

```json:metadata
{"files": ["go.mod", "cmd/server/main.go", "internal/config/config.go", "internal/config/config_test.go", "Dockerfile", "docker-compose.yml", "Makefile"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/config/ -v -count=1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["go build compiles", "GET /health returns 200", "docker compose up works", "make targets work"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Database Foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PostgreSQL connection, migration runner, initial schema (all 6 tables).

**Files:** internal/db/db.go, migrations/000001_initial_schema.up.sql, migrations/000001_initial_schema.down.sql

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/db/db.go", "internal/db/db_test.go", "migrations/000001_initial_schema.up.sql", "migrations/000001_initial_schema.down.sql"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/db/ -v -count=1 -tags=integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 6 tables created", "migration rollback works", "integration test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Authentication & Token Management
tasks.description:
**Goal:** PSK middleware, opaque token CRUD, permission checking, token auth middleware.

**Files:** internal/auth/*, internal/db/tokens.go, internal/api/middleware_*.go, internal/api/errors.go, internal/api/handlers_tokens.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/auth/psk.go", "internal/auth/token.go", "internal/auth/permission.go", "internal/db/tokens.go", "internal/api/middleware_psk.go", "internal/api/middleware_token.go", "internal/api/errors.go", "internal/api/responses.go", "internal/api/handlers_tokens.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/auth/... ./internal/api/... -v -count=1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PSK middleware works", "token CRUD works", "permission hierarchy enforced", "AI-friendly error format"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Folder Management API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Folder CRUD and access management endpoints.

**Files:** internal/db/folders.go, internal/db/access.go, internal/api/handlers_folders.go, internal/api/handlers_access.go, internal/api/router.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/db/folders.go", "internal/db/access.go", "internal/api/handlers_folders.go", "internal/api/handlers_access.go", "internal/api/router.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/db/... ./internal/api/... -v -count=1 -tags=integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["folder CRUD works", "access CRUD works", "workspace isolation enforced"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Git Core Operations
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bare repo lifecycle, file reading, commit creation, branch management, diff, log using go-git.

**Files:** internal/gitops/repo.go, files.go, commit.go, branch.go, diff.go, log.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/gitops/repo.go", "internal/gitops/files.go", "internal/gitops/commit.go", "internal/gitops/branch.go", "internal/gitops/diff.go", "internal/gitops/log.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/gitops/... -v -count=1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bare repo create/delete", "read files from refs", "create commits", "branch management", "diff between refs", "commit log"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Light Directory Operations
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Plain filesystem CRUD for light directories with path safety.

**Files:** internal/lightdir/service.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/lightdir/service.go", "internal/lightdir/service_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/lightdir/... -v -count=1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["file CRUD works", "path traversal prevented", "auto-create parent dirs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: File Operations REST API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire REST endpoints for file browsing, commits, history, and light directory operations.

**Files:** internal/api/handlers_files.go, internal/api/handlers_refs.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/api/handlers_files.go", "internal/api/handlers_refs.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/api/... -v -count=1 -tags=integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["tree/blob/raw endpoints work", "commit endpoint respects approval_mode", "log/diff endpoints work", "light dir file ops work", "refs endpoint returns SHA"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Proposal System
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Proposal lifecycle (PR model): CRUD, status transitions, comments, three-way merge.

**Files:** internal/db/proposals.go, internal/db/comments.go, internal/proposal/service.go, internal/gitops/merge.go, internal/api/handlers_proposals.go, internal/api/handlers_comments.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/db/proposals.go", "internal/db/comments.go", "internal/proposal/service.go", "internal/gitops/merge.go", "internal/api/handlers_proposals.go", "internal/api/handlers_comments.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/proposal/... ./internal/gitops/... ./internal/api/... -v -count=1 -tags=integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["proposal CRUD", "status machine enforced", "line-level comments", "three-way merge preview", "approve with conflict resolution"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Git HTTP Smart Protocol
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Git smart HTTP protocol server for clone/pull/push with server-side hooks.

**Files:** internal/gitops/httpserver.go, internal/gitops/hooks.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/gitops/httpserver.go", "internal/gitops/hooks.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/gitops/... -v -count=1 -tags=integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["git clone works", "git push works", "branch protection enforced", "auto-proposal creation on push to proposal/*", "permission matrix correct"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: WebDAV Server
tasks.description:
**Goal:** WebDAV endpoints — read-only for managed, read-write for light.

**Files:** internal/webdav/handler.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/webdav/handler.go", "internal/webdav/handler_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/webdav/... -v -count=1 -tags=integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PROPFIND works", "GET serves files", "light dir PUT/DELETE/MKCOL work", "managed dir writes return 403 with guidance"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Webhook System
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Webhook registration API and async event dispatch with HMAC signing.

**Files:** internal/db/webhooks.go, internal/webhook/events.go, internal/webhook/service.go, internal/api/handlers_webhooks.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/db/webhooks.go", "internal/webhook/events.go", "internal/webhook/service.go", "internal/api/handlers_webhooks.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/webhook/... ./internal/api/... -v -count=1 -tags=integration", "acceptanceCriteria": ["webhook CRUD", "events dispatched async", "HMAC-SHA256 signed", "event filter works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: AI-Friendly Error Responses & skill.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Standardize all error responses with guidance, serve skill.md.

**Files:** internal/api/errors.go, static/skill.md, cmd/server/main.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["internal/api/errors.go", "static/skill.md", "cmd/server/main.go"], "verifyCommand": "grep -r 'writeError' internal/api/ | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 4xx use structured format", "skill.md served at /skill.md", "docs URLs use config values"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: CLI Client Foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** folder9 CLI with auth, browse, pull, push, proposal commands.

**Files:** cmd/cli/main.go, internal/cli/*.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/cli/main.go", "internal/cli/client.go", "internal/cli/auth.go", "internal/cli/browse.go", "internal/cli/sync.go", "internal/cli/proposals.go", "internal/cli/config.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/cli/... -v -count=1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["auth login/whoami work", "ls/tree/cat work", "pull/push work", "proposals commands work", "--help is helpful"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 13: Daemon Mode
tasks.description:
**Goal:** folder9 daemon for local directory sync.

**Files:** cmd/daemon/main.go, internal/daemon/*.go

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cmd/daemon/main.go", "internal/daemon/daemon.go", "internal/daemon/watcher.go", "internal/daemon/sync.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./internal/daemon/... -v -count=1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pull sync works", "push sync (light) works", "bidirectional with conflict handling", "incremental sync", "auto-reconnect"]}
```
